title: oncidium tigratum
intro: Oncidium tigratum, also known as the Tiger Oncidium, is a species of orchid native to South America, characterized by its vibrant yellow flowers with dark brown or black stripes, resembling a tiger's fur. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oncidium tigratum are attributed to its ability to help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
